# Ali Ahmed — AI Solutions Engineer

> Personal site of Ali Ahmed, an AI Solutions Engineer who builds what he sells — LLM/RAG
> products, AI agents, and IoT platforms that ship to production. AI Solutions Engineer at
> Cognilium AI and Head of Product & Platforms at Bijli Bachao. Trusted to deliver Gates
> Foundation– and UNIDO-backed programmes; partners include P&G, Engro, and Aga Khan.
> Based in Lahore, Pakistan; open to remote-global roles and relocation to the Gulf, US, or Australia.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://alioahmed.com/): Who Ali Ahmed is — identity, proof figures, FAQ
- [Work](https://alioahmed.com/work): Everything shipped — case studies + the portfolio table
- [About](https://alioahmed.com/about): Full biography, year-by-year timeline, availability
- [Contact](https://alioahmed.com/contact): How to reach Ali — email, WhatsApp, socials

## Case studies
- [Cognilium AI](https://alioahmed.com/work/cognilium): 4 AI products idea-to-production + growth engine
- [Paralegent AI](https://alioahmed.com/work/paralegent): 18+ agent legal contract review, 30 hrs → 30 min
- [Bijli Bachao](https://alioahmed.com/work/bijli-bachao): 3 live IoT energy platforms, IEC standards
- [Wonder Women](https://alioahmed.com/work/wonder-women): Co-founded FemTech — Asani, P&G, HEC grant
- [Startup ecosystem](https://alioahmed.com/work/startup-ecosystem): EWC Pakistan + SEE Pakistan at national scale
- [CIRCLE × Gates Foundation](https://alioahmed.com/work/circle-gates): 10,000 women trained + the BI system
- [Build Buy Software](https://alioahmed.com/work/build-buy-software): Independent legal-tech directory (pre-launch)
